title: Phylogenetic Analyses of the JEV Gene Sequence
author: Wenjing Liu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdbci2iw

steps.title: Use Tianlong nucleic acid extraction instrument...
steps.instruction: Use Tianlong nucleic acid extraction instrument (automatic nucleic acid extraction instrument, model: np968. C, manufacturer: Suzhou Tianlong Biotechnology Co., Ltd.), and supporting nucleic acid extraction kit: Tianlong nucleic acid extraction kit (magnetic bead method EX-RNA/DNAvirus), manufacturer: Suzhou Tianlong Biotechnology Co., Ltd., for nucleic acid extraction. Perform the following operations in a biosafety cabinet. Add 200 μl of patient cerebrospinal fluid and serum specimens and mosquito grinding supernatant to each well in columns 1 and 7 of the 96-well plate provided with the nucleic acid extraction kit

steps.title: 33 μl of RNA extract was...
steps.instruction: 33 μl of RNA extract was placed in a 65 ° C water bath for 10 min.

steps.title: 32ul of RNA samples were pipetted...
steps.instruction: 32ul of RNA samples were pipetted into the first chain reaction tube in a Ready-To-Go kit kit (GE Healthcare, Little Chalfont, Buckinghamshire, UK) and allowed to stand at room temperature for 1 min.

steps.title: 1 ul of random primer (pdN6)...
steps.instruction: 1 ul of random primer (pdN6) (TaKaRa, Japan) was added to every sample.

steps.title: The E gene sequence of JE...
steps.instruction: The E gene sequence of JE virus was amplified by semi-nested PCR. The first round of amplification , using primers: JEV 3F: TTCATAGAAGGAGCCAGTGGA and JEV 3R: TCGTTTAAACTCGCGACTGA.he gene amplification system was 25 ul, including: 2 μl of cDNA template, 12.5 μl of GoTaq ® Green Master Mix-2 × (Promega, Madison, WI), 1 μl of upstream and downstream primers at 10 umol/L, and 8.5 μl of RNase Free Water. The reaction program was: 94 ° C, 8 min for 1 cycle; 94 ° C, 1 min, 55 ° C, 1 min, 72 ° C, 1 min for 35 cycles; 72 ° C, 10 min, keep in 4 ° C. The second round of amplification sequence was 300 bp, using the first round of PCR product as a template with the forward primer JEV 3F and the reverse primer JEV 2R: TTTCCCGAAAAGTCCACATC.

steps.title: The second round of amplification sequence...
steps.instruction: The second round of amplification sequence was 300 bp, using the first round of PCR product as a template with the forward primer JEV 3F and the reverse primer JEV 2R: TTTCCCGAAAAGTCCACATC,the amplification system and reaction program was same as the first round.

steps.title: The C+PrM gene sequence was also...
steps.instruction: The C+PrM gene sequence was also amplified by semi-nested PCR according to the same amplification system and procedure as E gene. The primers used for the first round of PCR were JE-C+PrM-1F (CGTTCTTCAAGTTTACAGCATTAGC) and JE-C+PrM-1R (CCYRTGTTYCTGCCAAGCATCCAMCC)

steps.title: primers used for the second round were JE-C+PrM-1Fand JE-C+PrM-2R (CGYTTGGAATGYCTRGTCCG)
steps.instruction: primers used for the second round were JE-C+PrM-1Fand JE-C+PrM-2R (CGYTTGGAATGYCTRGTCCG). The product of the first round of PCR was used as the template of the second round.The second round also use the same amplification system and procedure as E gene.

steps.title: 5 µL of the amplification product...
steps.instruction: 5 µL of the amplification product was detected by 1% agarose gel electrophoresis .

steps.title: Nucleotide sequence determination was done by Sangon Biotech Co
steps.instruction: Nucleotide sequence determination was done by Sangon Biotech Co. Ltd. (Shanghai, China, Beijing Sequencing Department).

steps.title: The viral gene nucleotide sequences were...
steps.instruction: The viral gene nucleotide sequences were spliced and corrected using SeqMan II software (DNA Star, Madison, WI, USA).

steps.title: The JEV gene sequences used for...
steps.instruction: The JEV gene sequences used for phylogenetic analysis were downloaded from GenBank( Table S1) .

steps.title: The ClustalW multiple sequence alignment was...
steps.instruction: The ClustalW multiple sequence alignment was performed using BioEdit (Version 7.0, Hall 1999).

steps.title: Neighbor-joining phylogenetic trees were drawn using MEGA6
steps.instruction: Neighbor-joining phylogenetic trees were drawn using MEGA6.0 with 1000 bootstrap replicates.
